intended_use: The MaxFOV 2 reconstruction software is intended for head and whole body CT scans.
intended_use_full: The MaxFOV 2 reconstruction software is intended for head and whole body CT scans.
target_condition: Patient size and positioning requirements resulting in portion of patient body outside nominal display field of view; radiation therapy planning for cancer treatment
ground_truth: Clinical reader assessment using 5-point Likert scale; phantom-based bench testing for contour accuracy and CT number accuracy
other_metrics: Clinical reader study: 49 CT exams scored by 5 external clinical readers on 5-point Likert scale for skin surface depiction, tissue densities in extended FOV region, and overall image quality
